a.xlink:title: Sends data sendDataIDs given in mapCouplingData with communication.
Receive from coupling partner and return whether coupling scheme has converged.
Returns all data to be sent.
Function to determine whether coupling scheme is an implicit coupling scheme.
Receives data receiveDataIDs given in mapCouplingData with communication.
Returns all data to be received.
Used to set flag after data has been received using receiveData().
apply acceleration to the current iteration
sends convergence to other participant via m2n
Measure whether coupling scheme has converged or not.
interface to provide accelerated data, depending on coupling scheme being used
Reset all convergence measurements after convergence.
Extrapolate coupling data from values of previous time windows.
used for storing send/receive data at end of acceleration, if not converged.
True if this process is running a slave.
